title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!
